import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut tokens: List<Int> = []
  mut current = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        if not string.is_empty(current)
          match string.parse_int(current)
          when Some(v)
            tokens = __list_int_push(tokens, v)
          when None
            ()
          end
          current = ""
        end
      else
        current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(current)
    match string.parse_int(current)
    when Some(v)
      tokens = __list_int_push(tokens, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end

  let a_opt = tokens.get(0)
  let b_opt = tokens.get(1)
  match a_opt
  when Some(a)
    match b_opt
    when Some(b)
      mut x = a
      mut y = b
      while y != 0
        let r = x % y
        x = y
        y = r
      end
      println("gcd=#{x}")
    when None
      ()
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
end
